spec_match.rationale: Excellently maps out the 5 strict gate criteria including scheme, content type, domain allowlist, and cookie parameters.

interactive.rationale: Provides a live text URL input, preset buttons, check execution, and renders live integrity digests on fake responses.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfectly aligns with the privacy fence specifications.

edge_cases.rationale: Handles invalid URLs, regex matches user parameters securely, and evaluates cryptographic digests via WebCrypto.

references.rationale: Direct links to the ChromeStatus feature entry and related sibling showcase concepts.

design_system.rationale: Clean UI cards using standard color styles and typography.

summary: A high-fidelity privacy audit representation of the five gates required for single-key exception inclusion.
